subcodes.first_line: O you who are firm in the Covenant! Your letter, wondrous and replete with inner meaning, was perused
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه بدیع معانی ملاحظه گردید نغمه بلبل وفا بود و یا گلبانگ
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @poems and quotation from poetry, @wisdom [hikmat]
